hero.title: Kuwanika
hero.lead: IATF ine chinangwa chekuita kuti webhusaiti iyi ive nyore, iverengeke, ishandiswe nekhibhodi, uye ienderane nematekinoroji anobatsira.
support: Nokuda kwekuwanika kwewebhu, IATF inoshandisa [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Kuwanika kunoshanda kunoudzwawo nechiitiko chakananga chevashandisi vezvigadzirwa zvinobatsira.

paragraphs: Kana iwe ukawana chipingamupinyi chekuwanika pane ino webhusaiti, ndapota chizivise neemail:
items: uri kushandisa unyanzvi hupi hwokubatsira, bhurawuza, kana kuti mudziyo upi, kana zvichiita
report.footnote: Haufaniri kunyora mushumo wepachena wechikanganiso. Rondedzero yakajeka yakakwana.

paragraphs: Nhau dzekuwanika dzinogona kupfupikiswa mudura revanhu rakakodzera kuitira kuti vagone kugadziriswa pachena. Ruzivo rwekuonana nemunhu uye ruzivo rwepachivande rusina basa rwunobviswa usati waburitswa.
Kana mushumo wako uchibatanidza mashoko omunhu oga, taura zvakajeka kudaro mumashoko.
Nzvimbo iyi yakarongerwa kuti ive duku uye inenge isingachinji. Dzimwe shanduro dzemitauro dzingave dzisina kukwana apo shanduro dziri kugadzirirwa.
